extraction.one_line_summary: MODOLO Sacha won a chaotic sprint after VAKOČ Petr's late attack was caught inside final kilometer, SAGAN Peter boxed and unable to contest.
tactical_patterns: VAKOČ Petr's solo attack absorbed Sky's four-man leadout 1km out, destroying BORAhansgrohe's positioning for SAGAN Peter.
Seven-rider teams created control vacuum; teams with 3-4 leadout men gained no advantage in final 700m chaos.
Sky committed four riders for VAN POPPEL Danny yet still couldn't prevent messy finish; numerical superiority ineffective here.
SAGAN boxed 15th with 900m remaining couldn't recover; sprinters beyond 10th wheel at final roundabout eliminated from contention.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: boxed in 15th position with 900m remaining, unable to move up despite having legs, finished 8th
rider_signals.MODOLO Sacha: positive: excels in chaotic sprints, found gap through center when organization collapsed, first World Tour win in two years
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: positive: took race lead despite second place; Sky's four-man train still delivered him to podium through chaos
rider_signals.VAKOČ Petr: neutral: late solo move disrupted sprint but caught inside 1km, tactical impact greater than result
rider_signals.HAAS Nathan: neutral: positioned near front multiple times suggesting form/intent but finished 10th without contesting sprint
rider_signals.REGUIGUI Youcef: neutral: Algerian champion well-positioned for Dimension Data but faded to fifth in final meters
